requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety and Lao Grid Suitability
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全与老挝电网适配
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全與寮國電網適配

summary.en: Laos uses a 230 V, 50 Hz nominal supply. Power tools should be documented for Lao grid conditions, plugs or adapters, charger input range, insulation, temperature rise, abnormal operation, and IEC 60745 or IEC 62841 style safety evidence where adopted or accepted by DOSM for regulated goods.
summary.zh: 老挝采用 230 V、50 Hz 标称供电。电动工具文件应覆盖老挝电网条件、插头或适配器、充电器输入范围、绝缘、温升、异常运行，以及 DOSM 对受管制商品采纳或接受的 IEC 60745 或 IEC 62841 类安全证据。
summary.zht: 寮國採用 230 V、50 Hz 標稱供電。電動工具文件應覆蓋寮國電網條件、插頭或適配器、充電器輸入範圍、絕緣、溫升、異常運行，以及 DOSM 對受管制商品採納或接受的 IEC 60745 或 IEC 62841 類安全證據。

standards_or_laws: Laos DOSM conformity certification for regulated goods
IEC 60745 series or IEC 62841 series where adopted or accepted for power tools
Lao grid context: 230 V, 50 Hz supply

summary.en: China files commonly rely on GB 3883 series safety reports plus CCC baseline evidence where the product or charger is in scope. China is also 50 Hz, but the common nominal supply reference is 220/380 V rather than Laos 230 V.
summary.zh: 中国文件通常依赖 GB 3883 系列安全报告，以及产品或充电器适用时的 CCC 基线证据。中国同为 50 Hz，但常用标称供电参考为 220/380 V，而不是老挝 230 V。
summary.zht: 中國文件通常依賴 GB 3883 系列安全報告，以及產品或充電器適用時的 CCC 基線證據。中國同為 50 Hz，但常用標稱供電參考為 220/380 V，而不是寮國 230 V。

standards_or_laws: China 220/380 V, 50 Hz nominal supply context

gap.en: Do not assume a China GB 3883 or CCC file automatically proves Laos market readiness. The 50 Hz frequency aligns, but voltage marking, charger input rating, plug arrangement, instructions, and DOSM regulated-goods certification status still need Laos-specific review.
gap.zh: 不能假定中国 GB 3883 或 CCC 文件自动证明老挝市场就绪。频率同为 50 Hz，但电压标识、充电器输入额定值、插头安排、说明书以及 DOSM 受管制商品认证状态仍需按老挝复核。
gap.zht: 不能假定中國 GB 3883 或 CCC 文件自動證明寮國市場就緒。頻率同為 50 Hz，但電壓標識、充電器輸入額定值、插頭安排、說明書以及 DOSM 受管制商品認證狀態仍需按寮國覆核。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory if the product is on the Lao regulated-goods list requiring DOSM conformity certification; technical standards are evidence routes where adopted or accepted.
mandatory_status.cn: China GB 3883 and CCC baseline evidence may be mandatory or commonly required depending on China product scope, but it is not a Laos approval.

source.publisher: Department of Standards and Metrology, Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Conditionally acceptable only after confirming DOSM regulated-goods status and documenting 230 V 50 Hz suitability, charger input range, and IEC 60745 or IEC 62841 style safety evidence for the exact marketed configuration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅在确认 DOSM 受管制商品状态，并为实际销售配置记录 230 V 50 Hz 适配性、充电器输入范围及 IEC 60745 或 IEC 62841 类安全证据后，才可有条件接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅在確認 DOSM 受管制商品狀態，並為實際銷售配置記錄 230 V 50 Hz 適配性、充電器輸入範圍及 IEC 60745 或 IEC 62841 類安全證據後，才可有條件接受。
